claim: Family 46 b(n) = n^3 - 2n^2 - n + 1 has Delta_3 = 49 = 7^2 and Galois group C_3
Splitting field of b(n) (family 46) equals Q(zeta_7 + zeta_7^-1) (conductor 7, h=1, totally real); shown via b(1-x) = -m(x), m = x^3+x^2-2x-1
Convergence-rate fit log|delta_N| = -A N log N + alpha N + c yields A ~ 5.9533 (rounded 6); WKB-exponent identity (PCF-1 v1.3 Thm 5) predicts A in {3,4} for cubic b
